subject: biology
title: 17M.3.HL.TZ1.18
question_html: Cells on the surface of intestinal villi have microvilli, which provide a large surface area for absorption. State another structural characteristic of these villus cells that adapts them to the absorption of nutrients.
solution_html:
a. tight junctions 

b. protein channels / membrane pumps 

c. large number of mitochondria
